text: T minus 30 seconds and counting. Standing by for terminal count. Attention for the two count final. 10, 9, 8, 7, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2, unité. Top. And we have engine start. And liftoff. LJP, décollage. Décollage, liftoff from a tropical rainforest to the edge of time itself. James Webb begins a voyage back to the birth of the universe. Punching a hole through the clouds. 20 seconds into the flight, good pitch program reported. Trajectoire est nominale. Vehicle performance is nominal.
